rule_metadata.author: Michael R. (@nahamike01)
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console
id: a9e416a8-e613-4f8b-88b8-a7d1d1af2f61
status: test
description: Detects the execution of CSharp interactive console by PowerShell
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/detecting-attacks-leveraging-the-net-framework/
author: Michael R. (@nahamike01)
date: 2020-03-08
modified: 2022-07-14
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1127
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \csi.exe
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \powershell.exe
    - \pwsh.exe
    - \powershell_ise.exe
    OriginalFileName: csi.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Possible depending on environment. Pair with other factors such as net connections,
  command-line args, etc.
level: high
